overall.description: First-person perspective footage from a survival horror video game. The player walks along a narrow dirt trail at night, illuminated only by a flashlight, passing stone walls and grassy terrain while approaching a distant abandoned structure. A wooden weapon is raised into view near the end of the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow dirt trail between stone wall and grassy hillside

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a continuous walk along a narrow rural trail at night. A rough stone wall runs along the left side while grassy terrain slopes upward on the right. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing scattered rocks and dry earth underfoot, with dark hills visible in the far distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching abandoned structure on rural trail

events.description: character raises wooden stick into left side of frame, gripping it ready for use

agents.ego_description: approaching the abandoned structure ahead while raising a wooden stick, suggesting cautious exploration

entered.detail: small dark structure or shed visible ahead on the path
wooden bat or stick held in the character's hand entering from the left

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, an abandoned shed becomes visible ahead in the flashlight beam. The camera approaches the structure, bringing it from the far distance to the mid-ground. Near the end of the segment, the character raises a wooden stick into view from the left side, holding it ready while continuing to advance toward the building.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark rural trail that leads toward a lonely, abandoned structure. It begins with a walk beside a rough stone wall and sloping grassy terrain, where a flashlight beam cuts through the night to reveal scattered rocks and dry earth. As the camera advances, the light catches the silhouette of a distant shed, bringing the weathered building steadily from the horizon into the mid-ground. The scene then shifts in tension as a wooden stick is raised into view from the left, held ready as the camera continues its approach toward the structure.
